briefdescription.para: This structure defines the sensor capabilities.

detaileddescription.para: Open of the image sensor considering the given configuration.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

parameterdescription.para: Open the image sensor considering the given configuration.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Close the image sensor considering the given configuration.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

parameterdescription.para: Close the image sensor considering the given configuration.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: reads a given number of bytes from the image sensor device

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

memberdef.argsstring: (IsiSensorHandle_t handle, const uint16_t addr, const uint16_t value)
memberdef.name: IsiWriteRegIss

detaileddescription.para: writes a given number of bytes to the image sensor device by calling the corresponding sensor-function

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: get cuurent sensor mode info.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: query sensor info.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.
Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: fills in the correct pointers for the sensor description struct

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Checks the connection to the camera sensor, if possible.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

parameterdescription.para: Performs the power-up sequence of the camera, if possible.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the sensor revision register and returns it.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

parameterdescription.para: reads the sensor revision register and returns this value

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Enables/disables streaming of sensor data, if possible.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

parameterdescription.para: Enables/disables streaming of sensor data, if possible.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

memberdef.argsstring: (float32_t totalGain, IsiGainInfo_t aGain, IsiGainInfo_t dGain, float32_t *splitAgain, float32_t *splitDgain)
memberdef.name: IsiGainExecuteIss

detaileddescription.para: complete the sensor gain execute.

parameterdescription.para: the sensor total gain need to execute
the limit of sensor analog gain
the limit of sensor digital gain
the pointer of split analog gain
the pointer of split digital gain

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Execute exposure divided in sensor driver.

parameterdescription.para: the input parameters for dividing exposure.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Execute exposure decompose in sensor driver.

parameterdescription.para: the input parameters for decomposing exposure.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Returns the Ae base info of a sensor instance

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the sensor aebase info value

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Reads gain values from the image sensor module.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to sensor again to get

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Reads gain values from the image sensor module.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to sensor dgain to get

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Writes gain values to the image sensor module.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to sensor again to set

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Writes gain values to the image sensor module.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to sensor dgain to set

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Reads integration time values from the image sensor module.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to integration time to get

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Writes integration time values to the image sensor module.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to sensor integration time to set

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Get Sensor Fps Config.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: set Sensor Fps Config.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Get sensor isp status.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: set sensor linear mode black level

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

parameterdescription.para: set sensor linear mode black level

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: set sensor linear mode black level

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: set sensor linear mode white balance or hdr mode normal exp frame white balance

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

parameterdescription.para: set sensor linear mode white balance or hdr mode normal exp frame white balance

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: set sensor linear mode white balance or hdr mode normal exp frame white balance

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: set sensor test pattern.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: set sensor test pattern.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: get sensor expand curve

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: get sensor compress curve

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: sensor extend function.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: get sensor otp data.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.
Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: create sensor focus

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: release sensor focus.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Triggers a forced calibration of the focus hardware.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Drives the lens system to a certain focus point.

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

detaileddescription.para: Retrieves the currently applied focus point.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to a variable to receive the current focus point

simplesect.para: Return the result of the function call.

briefdescription.para: Interface description for image sensor specific implementation (iss).
